channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Payer plus cher pour un vieux smartphone : l’ère des bonnes affaires est officiellement terminée chez Oppo et OnePlus
item.description: Regardez bien le prix de votre prochain smartphone Oppo ou OnePlus. Si vous hésitez, ne traînez pas trop. En raison d'une explosion des coûts des composants, les constructeurs chinois entament une manœuvre dangereuses : augmenter les tarifs de produits déjà commercialisés.

item.title: In Ancient Peru, Feather Traders Transported Live Parrots Across Treacherous Mountains
item.description: New findings challenge an “Inca-centric” view of South American history, the researchers say.

item.title: The Next ‘Star Wars’ Book Sets the Stage for the ‘Andor’ Revolution (Exclusive)
item.description: 'Edge of the Abyss', the second book in the 'Reign of the Empire' trilogy, is set a year before 'Andor', and includes plenty of key characters from the award-winning series.

item.title: ‘Pokémon Pokopia’ is even better than ‘Animal Crossing: New Horizons’
item.description: While "Animal Crossing" is pure escapism, "Pokopia" gives you the sensation of actually rehabilitating a broken world.

item.title: Satechi’s new folding dock adds USB, audio, and video ports to the iPad
item.description: Satechi has announced a redesigned version of the iPad Pro stand with USB-C hub functionality it launched nearly five years ago that's smaller and easier to travel with. The new OntheGo Foldable Stand Hub is available now through Satechi's online store and Amazon for $79.99 in space black. While the original was specifically designed for […]

item.title: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
item.description: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

item.title: 'It's massive': why the leaked Lenovo tablet with a huge JBL speaker on the back actually makes a lot of sense
item.description: Business up front, party in the back

item.title: Voici l’Origine Newton[e], un vélo électrique français de moins de 10 kg qui impressionne par sa légèreté
item.description: Le constructeur français Origine dévoile le Newton[e], un vélo de route électrique en carbone affichant seulement 9,83 kg sur la balance. Présentation.

item.title: Grammarly will keep using authors’ identities without permission unless they opt-out
item.description: Last week, my colleagues discovered that Superhuman's Grammarly had turned me into an AI editor, using my real name, without ever asking my permission. They did the same to my boss Nilay Patel, my colleagues David Pierce and Tom Warren, and - as Wired initially reported last Wednesday - many authors far more famous than […]

item.title: Le gouvernement relance son filtre anti-arnaques, prévu cette fois pour septembre
item.description: Où l'on reparle du filtre anti-arnaques du gouvernement. Le dispositif, qui aurait dû voir le jour pour les Jeux olympiques de Paris il y a deux ans, devrait finalement voir le jour le 1er septembre 2026. Si tout va bien.

item.title: The DJI Mini 4K is the 'best first drone' for most people — and it's now even cheaper than Black Friday
item.description: Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale is offering the best price we've ever seen on one of our favourite drones - the outstanding DJI Mini 4K.

item.title: Amazon's UK Spring Sale slashes its best-selling tech gadgets — here are 12 deals I'd buy from Blink, Ring, Kindle, Echo, and more
item.description: Amazon's UK Spring Sale is officially live, and I'm rounding up my favourite tech devices from Blink, Ring, Kindle, and Echo, with prices starting at just £24.

item.title: Pourquoi BYD va continuer à vendre des voitures électriques équipées d’anciennes batteries
item.description: BYD vient d'annoncer une nouvelle génération de batterie capable de se recharger en seulement 9 minutes. Mais plutôt que de tourner la page, BYD a choisi de conserver l'ancienne technologie en parallèle. Une bonne nouvelle pour les clients en quête d'une voiture électrique plus abordable.

item.title: They Helped Plan the January 6 Rally. Now Their Events Company Is Raking in Millions in Government Contracts
item.description: The Trump administration has awarded Event Strategies several contracts—including one that could be worth up to $100 million—with little competition, according to federal filings.

item.title: Comment débuter en impression 3D ? Nos conseils et nos astuces
item.description: Si vous débutez dans l'impression 3D, il se peut que vous fassiez face à une multitude de questions. Ce guide complet vous accompagnera pas à pas dans votre découverte de cette technologie fascinante.

item.title: The best Mario Day deals we found
item.description: It’s Mario Day, an annual celebration of Nintendo’s mascot. It falls every year on March 10th because the date spells out “MAR10,” but you probably knew that already. Even if you aren’t all that into Mario — good luck avoiding him with the upcoming Super Mario Galaxy movie — it’s an opportunity to save on […]

item.title: Live Nation settlement avoids breakup with Ticketmaster
item.description: To keep Ticketmaster, Live Nation is going to have to make some major changes. As first reported by Politico, Live Nation reached a settlement with the Department of Justice in its antitrust case that accused the live entertainment giant of monopolistic practices. Live Nation will reportedly pay at least $200 million in damages to states that were part of the lawsuit filed in May 2024, but avoid selling off Ticketmaster. Live Nation will also be required to make a few changes to its business practices. According to NBC News, Ticketmaster, a subsidiary of Live Nation, will be required to create...

item.title: Adobe Express and Acrobat are coming for business users in Microsoft 365 Copilot, 'making creativity more accessible to everyone'
item.description: Adobe is making its Express and Acrobat tools available through M365 Copilot following success integrating them with ChatGPT.

item.title: NVIDIA is reportedly working on its own open-source AI agent platform
item.description: NVIDIA is reportedly working on its own open-source AI agent platform, according to Wired. The chipmaker has been pitching the product to enterprise software companies. Reporting indicates it's going to be called NemoClaw, suggesting that the entire industry is going to embrace this whole "claw" naming convention moving forward. Just like OpenClaw, this will be a platform in which users dispatch AI agents to perform a variety of tasks. However, NVIDIA's effort looks to have an enterprise focus for now. To that end, reporting indicates that companies will be able to access this platform even if...

item.title: GeForce Now adds GOG syncing and 90fps game streaming in VR headsets
item.description: NVIDIA's GeForce Now game streaming platform has added a few minor but useful updates, especially for GOG and VR headset users, the company announced at Game Developer's Conference (GDC). The biggest technical improvement is for virtual reality headsets that support GeForce Now like the Apple Vision Pro and Meta Quest. Starting next week (March 19), those devices will be able to stream at 90 fps for Ultimate members (up from 60 fps) for improved smoothness, responsiveness and realism. Another helpful update is in-app labels coming "soon" to GeForce Now. Once you connect an Xbox or Ubisoft_ ac...

item.title: Here’s Where China Might Land Its First Astronauts on the Moon
item.description: Rimae Bode—a volcanic region on the Moon’s nearside—offers strategic advantages for a human landing as well as rich opportunities for scientific research, according to a new study.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous entendez partout sans peut-être réellement comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 4.5 with 6x Frame Generation is rolling out at the end of March
item.description: Nvidia's DLSS 4.5 with 6x Multi Frame Generation will be available starting March 31st for users with RTX 50-series GPUs, the company announced on Tuesday. With 6x Multi Frame Generation, Nvidia claims that DLSS 4.5 can generate "five additional frames for every single natively rendered one, for a maximum 6X multiplier." It's an increase from […]

item.title: The Witcher 4 : grâce à Nvidia, les forêts du jeu vont franchir un cap visuel jamais vu
item.description: Après Alan Wake 2, c'est au tour de The Witcher 4 de profiter de la technologie RTX Mega Geometry de Nvidia. Ici, elle servira à améliorer sensiblement le rendu des forêts très denses du jeu à sa sortie.

item.title: Meta is buying Moltbook, the ridiculous social network populated by AI bots
item.description: Meta is snapping up Moltbook, a Reddit-like social network for AI agents that has been around since January and remains completely ridiculous. The company hasn't disclosed the terms of the deal.Moltbook and its creators Matt Schlicht and Ben Parr will be joining Meta Superintelligence Labs (MSL) when the deal closes. That's expected to happen in the coming days, according to Axios.“The Moltbook team joining MSL opens up new ways for AI agents to work for people and businesses," a Meta spokesperson told TechCrunch. "Their approach to connecting agents through an always-on directory is a novel s...

item.title: Every influencer eventually becomes a merch store
item.description: Tucker Carlson's online store sells right-wing apparel and home goods, like hoodies in the Supreme streetwear style mocking Somali people or mugs with The Godfather puppetmaster iconography edited to feature AIPAC. But last week, a handful of other products caught the attention of those outside Carlson's typical audience: one is a red and yellow "NY […]...

item.title: The gym-friendly Beats Powerbeats Pro 2 are 20 percent off right now
item.description: Beats may have recently redesigned the Beats Fit Pro to be more comfortable and secure, but the company’s latest offering is still no match for its other pair of fitness-centric earbuds: the Powerbeats Pro 2. Luckily, the latter in-ears are on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for around $199.95 ($50 off), their second-best […]

item.title: How to watch Taco Bell Live Más Live 2026 online – outside the US, Doja Cat performs live, $1 deal
item.description: Watch fast-food giant mix entertainment with major menu reveals tonight. Here’s how you can stream Taco Bell Live Más Live 2026 online and from anywhere.

item.title: GPS Attacks Near Iran Are Wreaking Havoc on Delivery and Mapping Apps
item.description: Delivery apps are glitching and navigation routes are changing abruptly thanks to electronic warfare disrupting the satellite signals that power everything from missiles to your ride home.

item.title: Meta acquires Moltbook, the Reddit-like network for AI agents
item.description: Meta is acquiring Moltbook, a Reddit-like platform where AI agents can make and comment on posts, as first reported by Axios. In a statement to The Verge, Meta spokesperson Matthew Tye confirmed the Moltbook team will join Meta Superintelligence Labs as the company looks for "new ways for AI agents to work for people and […]

item.title: Shark’s ChillPill fan can cool your skin like an ice pack
item.description: SharkNinja has announced a new personal cooling device called the Shark ChillPill that takes three approaches to beating the heat. Unlike other wearable cooling devices that simply rely on moving air to help evaporate sweat, the ChillPill adds a metal cooling plate accessory to the mix you can press against your skin to immediately lower […]

item.title: 180 Hz, QHD, 21:9 : ce moniteur incurvé de 34″ taillé pour les jeux compétitifs ne dépasse pas les 250 € pendant les ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Grande dalle incurvée, fréquence de rafraîchissement élevée... L'écran PC AOC Gaming CU34G2XP a tout pour séduire les joueurs aguerris en quête d'immersion et de fluidité. Pendant ses ventes flash de printemps, Amazon l'affiche à 249,99 euros au lieu de 449 euros au lancement.

item.title: Rachat de SFR : la deuxième offre arrive malgré les tensions entre Bouygues Telecom et Free
item.description: Après une première offre rejetée à 17 milliards d'euros, le consortium formé par Orange, Free et Bouygues Telecom va bientôt faire sa deuxième proposition.

item.title: MacBook Neo : on a lu tous les tests, c’est le meilleur mauvais choix d’Apple
item.description: On l'attendait, le voici. Le MacBook Neo est la réponse d'Apple à la crise des composants. Pour 699 €, la firme de Cupertino recycle ses puces mobiles pour attaquer le marché étudiant. Beaucoup de compromis, c'est évident, mais est-ce que la formule est validé pour autant ? Nous avons épluché les premiers tests de la presse américaine.

item.title: 'There’s another surprise coming’: Resident Evil Requiem director confirms a mini game DLC is on the way and that there’s even bigger news to follow
item.description: Resident Evil Requiem's director just confirmed a mini-game DLC set for May, but fortunately, that's not the only surprise in store.

item.title: Amazon surveille de plus près son IA après plusieurs pannes de son site
item.description: L'IA générative, c'est formidable… jusqu'à ce que ça ne le soit plus. Amazon, dont la maintenance de l'infrastructure est gérée en partie par l'IA, a souffert de plusieurs pannes ces dernières semaines. Le groupe va surveiller d'un peu plus près ce que fabrique l'IA, avec l'aide de ses ingénieurs bien humains.

item.title: The Company That Made a Dish of Neurons Play DOOM Is Getting Into Brain Cell-Powered Data Centers
item.description: Cortical Labs says its working on two biological data centers.

item.title: The poison pill that malicious bots can't digest
item.description: Could turning an adversary’s power against them be an affective tactic for cybersecurity?

item.title: Thinking Machines Lab inks massive compute deal with Nvidia
item.description: The multi-year deal involves at least a gigawatt of compute power and also includes a strategic investment from Nvidia.

item.title: How to watch Ellis season 2 online for free – from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch Inspector Ellis season 2 online for free from anywhere as DCI Ellis returns to crack a new case

item.title: Simple Blood Test Can Predict Dementia 25 Years in Advance, Study Suggests
item.description: The blood biomarker p-tau217 has "shown the most promise in detecting Alzheimer's in the brain," researchers of a new study say.

item.title: Lego’s New Luigi ‘Mario Kart’ Set Is Begging for a Death Stare Tweak
item.description: For Mario Day, Lego remembered that other Mario brothers exist.

item.title: ‘Age Verification’ could force trans people to out themselves to use the internet
item.description: In 2026, a photo ID is not just paperwork - it essentially grants you permission to exist in society. Last month, Kansas legislature passed a law categorically invalidating trans people's driver's licenses and IDs overnight, requiring them to obtain new IDs with incorrect gender markers. Now, with a slew of online "Age Verification" laws requiring […]...

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, March 11 (game #1507)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, March 11 (game #1004)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, March 11 (game #738)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Google gives in to users’ complaints over AI-powered ‘Ask Photos’ search feature
item.description: The option appears on the Google Photos Search screen and lets users pick which experience they want.

item.title: You can stream the first 5 minutes of Virgin River season 7 episode 1 for free — but brace yourself for a shocking death
item.description: Virgin River season 7 drops in full in a few days time, but you can now stream the first 5 minutes of episode 1 for free... though there's a nasty surprise in store.

item.title: Voici l’intérieur de la nouvelle voiture électrique chinoise de Volkswagen en partenariat avec Xpeng : l’ID. Unyx 08
item.description: Volkswagen dévoile l'intérieur de son grand SUV électrique baptisé ID.Unyx 08 destiné au marché chinois. Un modèle ambitieux sur le papier, qui assume pleinement ses origines technologiques venues tout droit d'un constructeur chinois, à savoir XPeng.

item.title: Lenovo LOQ RTX 5050 laptop gets a huge £300 discount in Amazon's Spring Deal Days sale — with a Core i5 processor, 24GB RAM, and 1TB SSD
item.description: Lenovo LOQ is a powerful laptop for creatives, students, and power users — and it’s £300 (25%) off in Amazon’s Spring Deal Days sale right now.

item.title: Google brings Gemini-powered content creation tools to Docs, Sheets, Slides and Drive
item.description: Google is rolling out a batch of Gemini updates across its Workspace apps that give the AI assistant the ability to generate first drafts in Docs, build entire spreadsheets in Sheets, design presentations in Slides and answer questions about files stored in Drive. The features started rolling out on March 10 in beta for Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers and Gemini Alpha business customers, in English only. In Docs, a new "Help me create" tool produces a formatted first draft by pulling context from Drive, Gmail, Chat and the web based on a user's prompt. Gemini can also match the writing sty...

item.title: Galatasaray vs Liverpool Free Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 Round of 16 1st leg from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Galatasaray vs Liverpool live streams for free, with Arne Slot's side seeking revenge in Istanbul in the Champions League last 16 1st leg.

item.title: « Trop de coïncidences » : Microsoft force-t-il les mises à jour vers Windows 11 25H2 sans autorisation ?
item.description: De plus en plus d'utilisateurs racontent que leur PC s'est mis à jour vers Windows 11 25H2 sans leur accord. Certains y voient un bug, d'autres une volonté de Microsoft.

item.title: Want to store up to 32TB in a paperback-sized NAS? The TerraMaster F4 SSD is on sale right now for Amazon's Spring Deal Days
item.description: The TerraMaster F4 SSD is a fast, compact storage upgrade for just £368 — a great option for anyone building a reliable home or small-office NAS.

item.title: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon, c’est le bon moment pour changer son smartphone : voici le TOP 6 des deals à retenir
item.description: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon font aussi baisser le prix des smartphones. Tous les modèles y passent : du Google Pixel 10 à prix cassé, au tout nouveau Galaxy S26 Ultra, en passant par le Xiaomi 17 qui bénéficie lui aussi d’une belle remise. Ces promotions sont l’occasion parfaite de vous équiper à prix réduit.

item.title: Après la crise de son app, Sonos relance la machine avec deux nouvelles enceintes
item.description: Après une séquence très compliquée durant laquelle Sonos a surtout passé son temps à réparer les pots cassés de son application, le spécialiste de l'audio connecté lance finalement de nouveaux produits pour le grand public. Au menu : deux enceintes, les Sonos Play et Era 100 SL.

item.title: GrapheneOS vs le reste du monde : la guerre des ROMs Android est relancée
item.description: Vous essayez d'utiliser votre application bancaire sur un smartphone dégooglisé et tout bloque ? C'est le quotidien frustrant des utilisateurs de ROMs alternatives. Mais alors que certains tentent de contourner le verrou de Google, les développeurs de GrapheneOS accuse ouvertement Volla, Murena et Iodé de mentir sur leur niveau de sécurité réel.

item.title: Watch out Microsoft Teams users - hackers are spreading a dangerous new phishing scam, here's what we know
item.description: Hackers are pretending to be solving a spam problem but are actually deploying backdoors.

item.title: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legal tech boom endures
item.description: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

item.title: Meta acquired Moltbook, the AI agent social network that went viral because of fake posts
item.description: Meta says that Moltbook's approach to "connecting agents through an always-on-directory" is novel.

item.title: Sony is reportedly testing dynamic pricing on its PlayStation storefront that changes the price tag of over 190 games
item.description: Sony has been reportedly testing dynamic pricing on the PlayStation Store for months, offering users in certain regions huge discounts on first and third-party games.

item.title: MacBook Neo review: niceness on a budget
item.description: Apple’s long-awaited laptop is even cheaper than the pundits expected, and still feels like a Mac. For over 40 years, “Mac vs. PC” has been technology’s most iconic rivalry. Yet in many ways, it’s been an indirect one. Apple, being Apple, has mostly stuck to computers with four-digit price tags—a rarefied territory where it can make the products it wants to make, not just the ones a given price point allows. Meanwhile, one of the best things about Windows PCs is that there’s something for everyone, including folks who don’t have a ton of money to spend....

item.title: Alerte offre inédite pour Google Pixel 10 Pro XL : plus de 40 % de remise sur Amazon
item.description: Le Google Pixel 10 Pro XL n’a jamais été aussi abordable sur Amazon : affiché à 749 au lieu de 1 299 euros. Une occasion de mettre la main sur l’un des meilleurs photophones Android du marché, alliant puissance, design épuré et IA poussée.

item.title: The TCL C6K is 'a cheap mini-LED TV that's very good value for money' — and now it's down to a record-low price
item.description: Budget TVs don't get much better than the TCL C6K, delivering excellent performance for a low price — and it's now even cheaper in Amazon's Spring Sale.

item.title: 1 400 km d’autonomie, recharge en 10 minutes, moteurs électriques puissants : voici toutes les annonces de Renault, Dacia et Alpine
item.description: Renault vient de frapper un grand coup sur la voiture électrique : 1 400 km d'autonomie, recharge en 10 minutes et coûts en baisse de 40 %. Voici ce qu'il faut savoir sur les annonces de ce 10 mars 2026 pour Renault, Dacia et Alpine.

item.title: I reviewed the MacBook Neo, ask me anything
item.description: It's MacBook Neo review day, so let's talk Apple's new $599 laptop. I'm going to host another AMA for Verge subscribers today at 11AM PT / 2PM ET. Like last time, it'll all take place in the comments section of this post. What do you want to know about the MacBook Neo? I've got the […]

item.title: Photoshop’s new AI assistant makes it easer than ever to edit images
item.description: Unlike rival tools like Nano Banana or GPT-Image, the AI assistant in Photoshop web and mobile gives you ultra-precise editing capabilities. Today Adobe is launching the public beta of its new AI assistant for Photoshop Web and Photoshop Mobile. The company’s impressive new assistant technology enables anyone to do seemingly flawless photo editing—Nano Banana style—by prompting the apps. Then it ups its power by giving you easy and precise ways to interact with that software—whether it’s via voice or using your finger to navigate the interface.Photoshop Mobile and Web have included AI feature...

item.title: 21 super Lego sets to add to your Mario collection on Mar10 Day
item.description: These Boo-tiful sets will look pretty as a Peach on your shelves.

item.title: A Resident Evil Requiem story expansion is in the works
item.description: It takes around 30 hours to experience everything Resident Evil Requiem has to offer. If you've already enjoyed all the thrills and spills and you're itching for more, there's some positive news. Capcom has some updates on the way. The biggest of those is a story expansion, which is now in development. Just don't expect it to arrive imminently."In this story, we will delve deeper into the world of Requiem," game director Koshi Nakanishi said in a short video message. "We’re hard at work on it now. It will take some time, so we ask for your patience and hope you’ll look forward to it."A message...

item.title: Ericsson US reveals employee and customer data breach after third-party hack
item.description: An unnamed threat actor stole data on thousands of Ericsson US customers and employees, including names, payment, and medical details.
